subTitle: Mishaps and adventures follow as everyone tries to fill their buckets from the tanker. While Jethalal gets his foot stuck in a pot, Champaklal accidentally gets drenched to the bones.

subTitle: Talking to Jethalal, Taarak gets very emotional about the food Anjali makes him eat daily. Carrying the tiffin he was trying to avoid, he comes up with a plan to deal with it.

subTitle: Anjali is furious that Taarak has been giving away her home-cooked meals to strangers. She calls a meeting with all the men of Gokuldham to make a decision.

subTitle: While paragliding, Sonia witnesses a murder and informs Team CID. Since she was unable to see any of the faces, Abhijeet decides to retrace the route for clues, but they find no trace of a crime.

subTitle: Jethalal tries to apologise to Champaklal for coming home late, but the latter refuses to accept the former's apology.

subTitle: Nattu Kaka and Bagha are in a good mood and dance to garba songs at work to improve Jethalal's mood. Meanwhile, Daya's mother claims that Champaklal will not forgive Jethalal anytime soon.

subTitle: Jethalal goes to Taarak for advice on how to deal with his problem at home. However, all of Taarak's suggestions fail.

subTitle: Jethalal's plan to appease Champaklal appears to run as smoothly as planned. However, his scheme soon backfires, and things take a turn for the worst.

subTitle: Daya is deeply concerned about the conflict between her husband and father-in-law. Soon, even Jethalal's neighbours and friends begin to worry about the argument.

subTitle: Taarak tells Jethalal to go on a hunger strike until Champaklal feeds him with his own hands. This helps them bury their feud and reunite.
